channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Cybercab Has New Ultra-Efficient Powertrain, 4680 Batteries, 48V & More

item.title: Is Tesla (TSLA) One of the Best QQQ Stocks to Invest in?
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the best QQQ Stocks to invest in. On July 2, Tesla announced its production and delivery figures for Q2 2026.

item.title: Tesla: Why A Big Earnings Beat Is Likely
Tesla Stock Gets Stunning Price Target Hike From UBS on AI Boom
item.description: Tesla Wins Fresh AI Vote of Confidence From Top Bank

item.title: Radiologist who drove Tesla off cliff has attempted murder charges dismissed
item.description: A California radiologist who drove his Tesla Model Y off a 250-foot cliff in an attempt to kill his family has had his charges dismissed after doctors say he is “doing well” in a mental health program. Dharmesh Patel was charged with three counts of attempted murder in connection with a January 2...

item.title: Exclusive: Tesla Cybercab Includes Dual GPS
item.description: Exclusive: Tesla Cybercab Includes Dual GPS

item.title: Nio Follows Tesla Playbook — Launches New Seating Configuration For Best-Selling SUV
item.description: Nio launched a five-seat version of its ES8 SUV on Thursday.

item.title: Citizens says Tesla near-term optimism is too high
item.description: Investing.com -- Citizens began coverage of Tesla with a Market Perform rating on Thursday, citing concern that valuation expectations for the company's Optimus robot and Robotaxi products imply too near a launch timeline.

item.title: New bill would ban Tesla’s camera-only Robotaxi, not Waymo
item.description: New Jersey lawmakers are advancing a bill that would require driverless commercial vehicles to carry cameras plus two additional sensor types — a mandate Tesla’s camera-only Robotaxi can’t meet. The proposed law, S1677, would effectively lock Tesla out of the most densely populated US state unles...

item.title: RBC Capital Raises its Price Target on Tesla (TSLA)
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 15 Best NASDAQ 100 Stocks to Buy Other Than SpaceX. On July 7, 2026, RBC Capital raised the firm’s price target on Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Wall Street Finds a New Way to Help Investors Avoid Elon Musk
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- For every investor who wants more Elon Musk, Wall Street increasingly has an ETF. Now it’s planning some for investors who want less.Most Read from BloombergMicrosoft’s Xbox to Shift Obsidian Studio to New ‘Fallout’ Video GameNvidia’s $1 Trillion Slide Sends Valuation to Pre-AI Boo...

item.title: Tesla battery recycling efforts increased 20 percent last year
item.description: A common misconception of anti-EV proponents is that the batteries used in the vehicles are detrimental to the environment and that they cause more waste than they are worth. But a look at Tesla’s battery recycling efforts last year shows the company is doing more than ever to recover materials a...

item.title: CME Group Is Launching Elon Musk's Tesla and SpaceX Futures Contracts on July 27. Here's the Investment Case.
item.description: They're not really an investment in and of themselves, but they can certainly help you manage a more traditional position in either stock.

item.title: Global Battery Electric Vehicle Market Report Now Available; Profiles Tesla, BYD, and 33 Other Key Players
item.description: The battery electric vehicle market presents opportunities in advancing lithium-ion technology for better range and efficiency, leveraging government incentives and stricter emission standards, and expanding in emerging markets with infrastructure development, ultimately driving global adoption o...

item.title: Is Tesla In A Lose-Lose Situation With Autonomous Driving?
item.description: One of our excellent commenters posted an intriguing comment this morning under an article about how robotaxi app usage is split across the US market. I’ve been following and engaged in this debate for more than a decade, and I don’t think I’ve ever seen a comment quite like this. ...

item.title: Elon Musk Lost His Trillionaire Status as SpaceX Shares Dropped 26%. Are Tesla and SpaceX Stock Still a Buy?
item.description: Is it time to buy on the dip on these two tech stocks?

item.title: Ford issues US recall of Mustang Mach-E electric crossovers
item.description: The recall affects certain Mach-Es from the 2021, 2022, and 2023 model years, due to a potential issue with the rear differential. According to the NHTSA, the vehicles in question have a rear differential pinion shaft at risk of fracture.

item.title: Tesla Q2 Preview: Expecting Positive Results And Outlook To Remain Earthbound
Forget Tesla: If You Dislike That Tesla Remains Long on Promises and Short on Delivery, Play This Inverse ETF
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is once again eating the financial press, with a $1.58 trillion market cap resting on Cybercab, Optimus, and robotaxi promises that traders keep paying up to own. But here’s what you should actually be watching. The Hot Ticker Is Selling You a Timeline Strip away the AI narrat...

item.title: Tesla VP Confirms Grok FSD Integration is Coming Soon
item.description: Tesla VP Confirms Grok FSD Integration is Coming Soon

item.title: Why Tesla's "Immense" Opportunity In AI Will Disappoint Investors … For Now
item.description: Despite the excitement around Tesla's robotaxis and Optimus robots, investors will be disappointed in the short-term, this analyst argues.

item.title: Musk Wins Approval for SEC Settlement
item.description: Judge approves deal despite sharp public misgivings

item.title: Don’t Buy Tesla Stock, Analyst Says, Despite ‘Immense’ Potential
item.description: Tesla stock isn’t a buy right now, for one analyst, despite “immense” potential for AI to transform the company. Citizens analyst Andrew Boone launched coverage of Tesla stock with a Hold rating and no price target, according to ratings aggregators.

item.title: How SpaceX Stock Can Hit $900
item.description: There are, however, a few much higher numbers out there for investors to consider. Analyst John Godyn rates shares Buy with a $200 price target, but his bull case is much higher. “We believe this [$200] price target is a milestone along the path to $900-plus, which becomes realistic assuming key ...

item.title: If the "Magnificent Seven" Were Recreated, Here's What Stocks I'd Include (Hint: Not SpaceX)
item.description: The Magnificent Seven would become more AI-centric in this changeout.

item.title: Tesla stock gets a surprising SpaceX reset
item.description: Tesla’s (TSLA) fresh bull case lands at a strange moment for the stock. Investors were anxiously waiting for a demand reset after concerns of some major EV competition, sluggish margins, and lackluster growth. However, in a surprise turn of events, Tesla then beat Q2 delivery estimates by a ...

item.title: Some Good and Bad News for Tesla Investors
item.description: Tesla investors will need to be patient with the robotaxi rollout, but better-than-expected deliveries are bolstering the investment case for the stock.

item.title: $1,000 Invested in Tesla 10 Years Ago Is Worth Over $27,000 Today. Can SpaceX Follow That Same Path Over the Next Decade?
item.description: SpaceX would likely need to deliver on long-term ambitions for it to happen.

item.title: Elon Musk Says Optimus, AI Will Enable 'Excellent' Healthcare—Cathie Wood Sees $50 Billion AI Compute Need
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk believes that the company’s Optimus Humanoid robot, as well as its Artificial Intelligence efforts, will enable accessible healthcare for all in the future. Elon Musk Touts Optimus-Fueled Healthcare On Monday, Musk quoted a post on...

item.title: SPCX Stock Records 3-Day Slide: Elon Musk Admits Anthropic’s Fable Is 'Definitely Better' Than Grok 4.5
item.description: Musk said Grok 4.5 could improve weekly as SpaceXAI works to close the gap with Anthropic and OpenAI in an increasingly crowded AI race.

item.title: Tesla’s Model Y just got a sharper Rivian threat
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) has spent years turning the Model Y into the benchmark for electric SUVs. That supremacy has been a big advantage for Tesla. It has scale, brand awareness, manufacturing knowledge, and a car that helped define the electric vehicle category for the mainstream market.

item.title: Asleep Behind The Wheel Of A Tesla Using FSD?
item.description: A video that purports to show a Tesla driver asleep behind the wheel has appeared on social media. Is it a fake? The post Asleep Behind The Wheel Of A Tesla Using FSD?

item.title: This Robotaxi Company Is Growing Its Share Of US Market — Not Waymo, Not Tesla
item.description: Depending on which side of the fence you sit on, either Waymo or Tesla is leading the robotaxi revolution in the United States. Objectively, Waymo has far more self-driving cars and robotaxi users, but Tesla fans think only Tesla has the right approach long term, and that improvements in “Full ...

item.title: Tesla FSD Is More Energy Efficient Than Human Drivers
item.description: Tesla FSD Is More Energy Efficient Than Human Drivers

item.title: Dow Ends Lower To Record Worst Day In Nearly A Month As US-Iran Jitters Push Oil Prices — TSLA, NVDA, BE, AAPL, WBD In Focus
item.description: President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, and "it will get much worse" if Iran continues to bomb ships.

item.title: Elon Musk’s AI jobs prediction gets harsh reality check
item.description: Tesla CEO (TSLA) Elon Musk is back again, pushing one of his boldest claims about the AI boom, in which the technology might eventually make work optional. Musk first made that prediction at the U.S.-Saudi Investment Forum. Sitting alongside Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, Musk told the crowd, “My ...

item.title: Top Research Reports for Tesla, Bank of America & Merck
item.description: Tesla, Bank of America and Merck lead today's featured research, highlighting growth drivers, risks and outlooks shaping these widely watched stocks.

item.title: Why a Tesla-SpaceX Merger Is No Sure Thing
item.description: BNP Paribas analyst James Picariello doesn’t see a Tesla-SpaceX merger happening any time soon. He ticks off several reasons why.

item.title: Tesla Stock Sank 7% Despite Record Deliveries
item.description: Record deliveries weren't enough to impress investors, but a robotaxi expansion was. Here's why Tesla's future may depend far more on AI than on cars.

item.title: Tesla Model 2/Q: The $25,000 Car That Never Was
item.description: Tesla Model 2/Q: The $25,000 Car That Never Was

item.title: Tesla FSD is about to know your specific house and neighborhood better than any map
item.description: Tesla is building a feature that will let drivers talk to their car in plain language and teach it exactly what to do, with the vehicle remembering those instructions for every future trip. Tesla VP of AI Software Ashok Elluswamy confirmed it this week on X after a user pointed out one of FSD’s m...

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips: Tesla's AI Chief Confirms Voice Commands For FSD Under Works
item.description: Tesla AI chief Ashok Elluswamy said that the company is working on voice commands for FSD.

item.title: China is bringing buttons back to cars, ending trend led by Tesla
item.description: China will require automakers to include physical buttons for safety-related functions, pushing back on the proliferation of using screens for everything in modern cars.

item.title: 'Big Short' Michael Burry Bets Against Nvidia and Tesla Again
item.description: Michael Burry Sounds Alarm on Nvidia, Tesla With Fresh Bearish Bets

item.title: Price Prediction: Tesla Will Trade at This Price in 3 Years
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) is the most polarizing stock in the S&P 500. Automotive gross margin snapped back to 21.1% in Q1 2026 from 16.2% a year earlier, FSD active subscriptions hit 1.28 million (+51% YoY), and shares still sit down 6.66% year to date at $419.77. The question is whether Tesla can tra...

item.title: SpaceX Unveils New xAI Logo
item.description: SpaceX Unveils New xAI Logo

item.title: Is Tesla Stock a Buy as Deliveries Come in Ahead of Expectations and Its Robotaxis Launch in Miami?
item.description: Tesla has had some good news recently, but the stock is not out of the woods yet.

item.title: Elon Musk loses $50 billion in a single day; SpaceX moves bitcoin
item.description: SpaceX shares fell over 6% and Tesla dropped nearly 4% on Tuesday, wiping more than $50 billion off Elon Musk's net worth and pushing him below the $1 trillion mark. Meanwhile, SpaceX's bitcoin wallet — holding 18,712 BTC — made its first transaction in six months. CoinDesk's Jennifer Sanasie hos...

item.title: Musk's OpenAI Fight Moves Toward Mediation
item.description: Legal battle follows rejected $150 billion lawsuit.
